member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.ActivityActionType
member.summary: Classifies the file operation recorded in the activity feed (S013).

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.ActivityActionType.Downloaded
member.summary: A remote file was downloaded to the local machine.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.ActivityActionType.Uploaded
member.summary: A local file was uploaded to OneDrive.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.ActivityActionType.Skipped
member.summary: A file was skipped because it was already in sync.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.ActivityActionType.ConflictDetected
member.summary: A conflict between local and remote versions was detected.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.ActivityActionType.Error
member.summary: A file operation failed.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.IActivityReporter
member.summary: Receives a notification after each file operation performed by the sync engine (S013). The default registration is ; the desktop app overrides this with ActivityFeedService which surfaces events to the Activity view.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.IActivityReporter.Report(System.String,AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.ActivityActionType,System.String)
member.summary: Records a single file operation event.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Activity.NullActivityReporter
member.summary: No-op implementation used when no activity feed consumer is registered.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Concurrency.SyncGate
member.summary: Enforces: max one active sync per account (SE-02, SE-06) and manages the per-account transfer-slot (configurable 1–10, default 5, hard ceiling 10).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Concurrency.SyncGate.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a with the configured max concurrent transfers per account.
member.param: Must be in range 1–10; values outside are clamped.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Concurrency.SyncGate.TryBeginSync(System.String)
member.summary: Attempts to register as actively syncing.
member.returns: if the slot was acquired; if that account is already syncing.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Concurrency.SyncGate.EndSync(System.String)
member.summary: Releases the active-sync slot for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Concurrency.SyncGate.IsAnyAccountSyncing
member.summary: Returns if at least one account is currently syncing.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Concurrency.SyncGate.GetTransferSlots(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the governing concurrent file transfers for .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.DiskSpace.IDiskSpaceChecker
member.summary: Abstracts disk space queries so implementations can be replaced in tests (EH-03).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.DiskSpace.IDiskSpaceChecker.GetAvailableFreeSpace(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the available free bytes on the drive that hosts .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.FileTransfer.IFileTransferService
member.summary: Abstracts download and upload operations for a single file transfer slot (SE-02). Registered as Transient — one instance per transfer slot.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.FileTransfer.IFileTransferService.DownloadAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads a remote file to the local file system.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.FileTransfer.IFileTransferService.UploadAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.IProgress{System.Int64},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uploads a local file to OneDrive.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.LocalScanning.ILocalFileScanner
member.summary: Scans a local directory tree and yields file paths suitable for upload (SE-15). Skips symlinks, hardlinks, .git directories, and socket files. Uses IAsyncEnumerable so the list is never fully materialised in memory (NF-03).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.LocalScanning.ILocalFileScanner.ScanAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enumerates all uploadable file paths under . Special files and .git folders are silently skipped (logged at Debug).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.EtaCalculator
member.summary: Calculates estimated time remaining for a sync run (SE-14). ETA is recalculated after each file completes and after each Graph 429 delay. Thread-safe via .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.EtaCalculator.RecordFileCompleted
member.summary: Records that one more file has completed processing.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.EtaCalculator.RecordDelay(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Records an additional delay (e.g., a Graph 429 back-off pause) to include in the ETA.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.EtaCalculator.CalculateEtaSeconds(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculates the estimated seconds remaining given . Returns 0 when no files have been completed yet (avoiding division by zero).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.ISyncProgressReporter
member.summary: Publishes real-time sync progress for a given account without polling (SE-13, SE-14, NF-01). The UI subscribes to and applies .ObserveOn(RxApp.MainThreadScheduler) at the subscription site — this interface is UI-thread-agnostic.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.ISyncProgressReporter.GetProgressStream(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a hot observable that emits progress snapshots for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.ISyncProgressReporter.Report(System.String,AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.SyncProgress)
member.summary: Publishes a new snapshot for .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.SyncProgress
member.summary: A snapshot of sync progress for a single account at a point in time (SE-13, SE-14).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.SyncProgress.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: A snapshot of sync progress for a single account at a point in time (SE-13, SE-14).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.SyncProgressFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.SyncProgressFactory.Create(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a snapshot.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.ProgressTracking.SyncProgressReporter.Dispose
member.summary: Completes all subjects and releases resources.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffPolicy
member.summary: Retries an async operation with exponential back-off: 2^attempt seconds, max 5 retries, capped at 60 s (EH-01). Respects so shutdown is honoured during waits.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffPolicy.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffPolicy})
member.summary: Retries an async operation with exponential back-off: 2^attempt seconds, max 5 retries, capped at 60 s (EH-01). Respects so shutdown is honoured during waits.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffPolicy.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes with exponential back-off on failure. Returns when the operation succeeds or all retries are exhausted (in which case the last exception is re-thrown).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffPolicy.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes with exponential back-off on failure. Returns the result when the operation succeeds or all retries are exhausted.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Scheduling.ISyncScheduler
member.summary: Drives scheduled sync runs per account based on a configured interval (SE-04, SE-06). Skips a tick if a sync for that account is already running. Respects from IHostApplicationLifetime for clean shutdown.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.Scheduling.ISyncScheduler.StartAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts the scheduler loop. Completes when is cancelled.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore
member.summary: Persists sync state and resume checkpoints to SQLite per account (EH-04, EH-05, EH-06). All methods are thread-safe and accept a for clean shutdown.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore.SetStateAsync(System.String,AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncAccountState,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists the current for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore.GetStateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the last persisted state for , or if none.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore.SaveCheckpointAsync(AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncCheckpoint,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves a resume checkpoint for the account identified by .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore.GetCheckpointAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the most recent checkpoint for , or if none.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore.ClearCheckpointAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes the checkpoint for after a successful sync.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore.SaveDeltaTokenAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists the returned by the last successful sync for (SE-09).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.ISyncStateStore.GetDeltaTokenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the stored delta token for , or if none (SE-09).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncAccountState
member.summary: The lifecycle state of a sync run for a single account (EH-04, EH-05, EH-06).

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncAccountState.Running
member.summary: A sync is currently in progress.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncAccountState.Interrupted
member.summary: The sync was interrupted (network failure, app shutdown) before completing.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncAccountState.Completed
member.summary: The sync completed successfully.

member.name: F:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncAccountState.Failed
member.summary: The sync failed with an unrecoverable error.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncCheckpoint
member.summary: Records the last successfully processed file so an interrupted sync can be resumed (EH-05).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncCheckpoint.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Records the last successfully processed file so an interrupted sync can be resumed (EH-05).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncCheckpointFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.StateTracking.SyncCheckpointFactory.Create(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a stamped with the current UTC time.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.ISyncEngine
member.summary: Orchestrates a complete bi-directional sync run for a single account (SE-01 to SE-15). All methods return — the engine never throws into callers (NF-16). Registered as a singleton; thread-safe via the concurrency gate.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.ISyncEngine.StartSyncAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Starts a sync for . When is , the stored delta token is ignored. Returns a completed on success.
If another account is already syncing, is (SE-05). The UI (S012) decides whether to prompt the user — the engine does not block.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.ISyncEngine.GetProgressStream(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the live progress observable for (SE-13, SE-14, NF-01).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineError
member.summary: Base discriminated union for all sync engine failures.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base discriminated union for all sync engine failures.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncAlreadyRunningError
member.summary: Returned when a sync is already in progress for the same account (SE-02, SE-06).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncAlreadyRunningError.#ctor
member.summary: Returned when a sync is already in progress for the same account (SE-02, SE-06).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.InsufficientDiskSpaceError
member.summary: Returned when the estimated download size exceeds available disk space + 10% buffer (EH-03).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.InsufficientDiskSpaceError.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Returned when the estimated download size exceeds available disk space + 10% buffer (EH-03).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.FullResyncRequiredError
member.summary: Returned when the persisted delta token has expired and the caller must confirm a full re-sync (SE-10).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.FullResyncRequiredError.#ctor
member.summary: Returned when the persisted delta token has expired and the caller must confirm a full re-sync (SE-10).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.ResumeFailedError
member.summary: Returned when the interrupted-sync checkpoint is corrupt and a resume cannot be attempted (EH-06).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.ResumeFailedError.#ctor
member.summary: Returned when the interrupted-sync checkpoint is corrupt and a resume cannot be attempted (EH-06).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.LocalPathUnavailableError
member.summary: Returned when the local sync folder is not accessible (e.g. unmounted drive) (AM-11).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.LocalPathUnavailableError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Returned when the local sync folder is not accessible (e.g. unmounted drive) (AM-11).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.DeltaQueryFailedError
member.summary: Returned when the delta query fails for a reason other than token expiry.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.DeltaQueryFailedError.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Returned when the delta query fails for a reason other than token expiry.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineErrorFactory
member.summary: Factory for subtypes.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineErrorFactory.AlreadyRunning
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineErrorFactory.InsufficientSpace(System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates an .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineErrorFactory.FullResyncRequired
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineErrorFactory.ResumeFailed
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineErrorFactory.LocalPathUnavailable(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncEngineErrorFactory.DeltaQueryFailed(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncReport
member.summary: Summary of a completed sync run for an account.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncReport.#ctor(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Summary of a completed sync run for an account.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncReportFactory
member.summary: Factory for .

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Features.SyncOrchestration.SyncReportFactory.Create(System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a .

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.IDbBackupService
member.summary: Creates a backup of the sync SQLite database before each sync run (EH-07). Backup is best-effort: failure is logged at Warning and the sync proceeds.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.IDbBackupService.BackupAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Backs up the database. Returns if successful, otherwise.

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage
member.summary: Compile-time log message templates for the sync engine (NF-00).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SyncStarted(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Logs that a sync run has started for an account.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SyncCompleted(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Logs that a sync run completed successfully.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SyncFailed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a sync failure with a reason.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SyncInterrupted(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that a sync was interrupted before completing.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SyncPaused(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that a scheduled sync tick was skipped because a sync is already in progress.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SyncResuming(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that an interrupted sync is being resumed from a checkpoint.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.FolderRenamed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a successful local folder rename triggered by a delta item.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.FolderRenameFailed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that a local folder rename failed.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SkippedFile(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that a special file was skipped during local scan.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.SkippedDirectory(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that an excluded directory was skipped during local scan.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.FullResyncFileSkipped(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that a file was skipped during full re-sync because local and remote match.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.RetryingAfterDelay(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Double,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a retry attempt after a failure, including the scheduled delay.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.DbBackupFailed(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that a DB backup failed; sync will proceed without a backup.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.MultiAccountSyncWarning(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs the multi-account sync warning for an account (SE-05).

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.FileSkipped(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String)
member.summary: Logs that a file matched local and remote and was skipped.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.Infrastructure.SyncEngineLogMessage.DestructiveActionPending(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Logs a destructive action (delete/rename) before it is executed (NF-04).

member.name: T:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncEngineServiceExtensions
member.summary: Registers all sync engine services into the DI container.

member.name: M:AStar.Dev.Sync.Engine.SyncEngineServiceExtensions.AddSyncEngine(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds the sync engine, scheduler, progress reporter, and supporting services as singletons, with registered as transient (one instance per transfer slot).
